examples: In the mornings the sky appeared a heavy shade of mottled grey.
One big mottled arm shot out and caught Toad by a fore-leg, while the other-gripped him fast by a hind-leg.
His face was mottled red and white with embarrassment.
Santo Loquasto's mottled-print outfits in muddy colors only add to the work's largely dull effect.
All around us were the unfriendliest clouds I'd ever seen, mottled gray and black, fuming.
